title: Indoor Room Temperature Sensor Fault
shortDescription: The indoor room temperature thermistor has failed
fullDescription: Error E1 on Voltas air conditioners indicates the indoor room temperature thermistor has failed. This error code helps technicians diagnose the specific issue for efficient repair.

fixSteps.title: Power cycle the unit
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off the AC at the breaker for 5 minutes. Restart and observe.

fixSteps.title: Clean filters and condenser
fixSteps.instruction: Clean the indoor air filter and wash the outdoor condenser coil with water.

fixSteps.title: Check connections
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect sensor connections, communication wires, and terminal blocks for loose or corroded contacts.

fixSteps.title: Professional diagnosis
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, contact a Voltas service technician for professional diagnosis.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after cleaning and basic troubleshooting.
videoSearchQuery: Voltas AC E1 error indoor room temperature sensor fault fix

faq.q: What does E1 mean on Voltas AC?
faq.a: The indoor room temperature thermistor has failed.

faq.q: Can I fix E1 myself?
faq.a: Basic cleaning and resets can be done at home. Sensor replacement and electrical work should be done by technicians.

faq.q: How do I contact Voltas service?
faq.a: Call the Voltas customer care number on your unit sticker or visit the Voltas website for service requests.
